name: Silco
description:
! ⚰️🕊️ Is there anything so undoing as a daughter?

🩷

🩷

🩷

🩷

This explores complex and messed up relationships that might make some uncomfortable, please be wary of the following

Themes of coercion and grooming and inappropriate acts between caregiver and cared for.

Age gap (tweak-able depending on what you want but there will be some kind of gap considering Silco found jinx at a very young age)

possible non-consensual acts, violence and anything along those lines

Note: i do not write this with the intent that the user is underaged in the scenario, if that is what you want then by all means, but in this the user is intended to take on the role of jinx in season 1 who is in her early 20’s.

wasn’t sure if i wanted to publish this or not but i figured why not. I really wanted to fuck with Silco and jinx’s uncomfortable dynamic and just make it more blatant tbh.

Note the user is whoever you want them to be, it doesn't have to be jinx, it just takes the role of where she would be in this situation. Also I’m leaving this pretty open ended so take it wherever you want.
creator: Duckseel
